"visible", "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [56, 56, 1272, 1776], "focused": false, "selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": true, "children": [{"text": "The Basic module contains basic commands to learn how to use me and other crossing services. In addition to these commands, this module enables me to communicate with you.

 1 LIST OF COMMANDS 
 1.1 RANDOM TOPIC: I briefly talk you about a random topic.
 1.2 ABOUT YOU CREATOR: present who created me. 
 1.3 INTRODUCE YOURSELF: I introduce myself. 
 1.4 ABILITIES: I'll tell you briefly what I can do.
 1.5 HELP: load a page in containing a set of helps and advices.
 1.6 TUTORIAL: Start a multimedia presentation with an explanation on how to use me to the fullest.
 EXAMPLE: Introduce yourself; Help, How are you? 
 In the store there is available an upgrade for this module that adds two new commands, giving me the ability to identify and introduce any subject you ask me. You can see how these commands work in the free module Person.

In addition to these commands, this module enables me to communicate with you.

 1 LIST OF COMMANDS 
 1.1 RANDOM TOPIC: I briefly talk you about a random topic.
 1.2 ABOUT YOU CREATOR: present who created me. 
 1.3 INTRODUCE YOURSELF: I introduce myself. 
 1.4 ABILITIES: I'll tell you briefly what I can do.
 1.5 HELP: load a page in containing a set of helps and advices.
 1.6 TUTORIAL: Start a multimedia presentation with an explanation on how to use me to the fullest.
 EXAMPLE: Introduce yourself; Help, How are you? 
 In the store there is available an upgrade for this module that adds two new commands, giving me the ability to identify and introduce any subject you ask me. You can see how these commands work in the free module Person.
